name: @uptimizr/babylon
description: Babylon.js connector for Uptimizr — captures camera, pointer, mesh, and perf events as an sdk-core collector.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && pnpm run bundle && pnpm run bundle:global
scripts.bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:@babylonjs/core --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/babylon standalone bundle — Apache-2.0. Async-import into any page (e.g. playground.babylonjs.com); @babylonjs/core stays external (type-only). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-babylon.js
scripts.bundle:global: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=Uptimizr --platform=browser --target=es2022 --external:@babylonjs/core --minify --legal-comments=none --banner:js="/* @uptimizr/babylon standalone bundle (global) — Apache-2.0. Inject via a <script> tag into any page (e.g. playground.babylonjs.com); exposes window.Uptimizr. @babylonjs/core stays external (type-only). */" --outfile=dist/uptimizr-babylon.global.js
